name: Southwest Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: 12 oz SpamLite, diced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 can Diced mild green chiles (4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg and milk together; add the corn.
3. Mix in the bell pepper, green chiles, and cheese with the dry ingredients.
4. Add the browned and drained SpamLite to the mixture until just combined.
5. Grease muffin pans and pour the batter into each cavity.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serve with a nice green salad.
